{{nihongo|'''Kamutono Shrine'''|神門神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tajima Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kamutono Shrine'''|神門神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tajima Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kamutono Shrine'''|神門神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tajima Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kamutono Shrine'''|神門神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tajima Province]].
